problem id: ada01a20
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHR(6) OR NOT SHL(1)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  00011101 -> 10000001
  01001011 -> 01101001
  00110100 -> 10000110
  11011001 -> 00001011
  10010110 -> 11010010
  01100011 -> 00101000
  00001000 -> 00000001
  01010010 -> 01001010
  10111011 -> 00000011

query: 00100110
predicted answer: 10000000
